metadata.description: The subject is a female presenting individual in their 40s with fair skin and visible fine lines around the eyes and forehead. Their face is an oval shape with a softly defined jawline. They have short, dark brown hair styled in a pixie cut, with a natural hairline. Their eyes are dark brown, almond-shaped, and set slightly wide apart. Their eyebrows are medium thickness and gently arched. The nose has a straight bridge and a slightly rounded tip. The mouth features medium-thick lips with a natural, unsmiling shape. No distinguishing features like freckles or moles are prominently visible. The individual has a neutral expression, looking directly at the viewer, with their head held straight.
metadata.anchor: Woman with short dark hair and neutral expression.
